# Cross-solver comparison summary (auto-generated)

Generated by `compare`; raw samples in [`samples.csv`](samples.csv).

- CPU: Intel(R) Xeon(R) Processor
- Compiler: rustc 1.83.0 (90b35a623 2024-11-26) (release, thin LTO)
- Commit: 59cccfe
- Repeats: 10; rolling steps per repeat: 10; dense-Q cutoff: n <= 1000
- `-l1` instances: proportional turnover costs of 10 bps per asset, anchored at the shared primal start; Ledge uses its prox block, external solvers the epigraph reformulation (n extra variables, 2n inequality rows)

## Warm-start support (protocol rule 3)

| solver | rolling-phase warm start |
|---|---|
| ledge | primal + dual |
| osqp (lifted) | primal + dual |
| osqp (dense-Q) | primal + dual |
| clarabel (lifted) | unsupported |
| clarabel (dense-Q) | unsupported |
